(eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}]},"events":{"Approval(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when `owner` enables `approved` to manage the `tokenId` token."},"ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool)":{"details":"Emitted when `owner` enables or disables (`approved`) `operator` to manage all of its assets."},"Transfer(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when `tokenId` token is transferred from `from` to `to`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"balanceOf(address)":{"details":"Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account."},"getApproved(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist."},"isApprovedForAll(address,address)":{"details":"Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}"},"name()":{"details":"Returns the token collection name."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"ownerOf(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the owner of the `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event."},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"symbol()":{"details":"Returns the token collection symbol."},"tokenURI(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for `tokenId` token."},"transferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Override all transfer functions to make this soulbound."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"_memberships":{"details":"Maps tokenId \u2192 list of community registry addresses"},"handles":{"details":"Maps tokenId \u2192 platform handle"},"kycHashes":{"details":"Maps tokenId \u2192 ZK-KYC hash (bytes32(0) = not verified)"},"memberRoles":{"details":"Maps tokenId \u2192 community address \u2192 member role + joined timestamp"},"platformFactory":{"details":"Access control \u2014 which addresses can call privileged functions"},"projectsCompleted":{"details":"Counters for reputation display"},"reputationScores":{"details":"Reputation score 0\u201310000 basis points"},"walletToTokenId":{"details":"Maps wallet address \u2192 tokenId (0 = not registered)"}},"title":"PlatformNFTRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"addCommunityMembership(uint256,address,uint8)":{"notice":"Add community membership to a user's NFT."},"getMemberships(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns all community addresses the user is a member of."},"getReputationScore(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns the on-chain reputation score (0\u201310000 basis points)."},"getTokenId(address)":{"notice":"Returns the token ID for a given wallet address. Returns 0 if not registered."},"isMember(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Returns true if the token is currently a member of the given community."},"isVerified(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns true if the token holds a valid KYC hash."},"mint(address,string)":{"notice":"Mint a soulbound NFT to a new user. Called by PlatformFactory on registration."},"registerBountyContract(address)":{"notice":"Register a bounty contract for privileged reputation callbacks."},"registerCommunity(address)":{"notice":"Register a community registry for privileged membership callbacks."},"registerProjectContract(address)":{"notice":"Register a project contract for privileged reputation callbacks."},"removeCommunityMembership(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Remove community membership from a user's NFT."},"setKYCHash(uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Set ZK-KYC hash. Called by the platform KYC oracle after off-chain verification."},"updateReputation(uint256,(bool,bool,bool,uint8))":{"notice":"Update reputation counters. balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account.

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

ownerOf(uint256).details: Returns the owner of the `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

tokenURI(uint256).details: Returns the Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for `tokenId` token.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Override all transfer functions to make this soulbound.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addCommunityMembership(uint256,address,u.notice: Add community membership to a user's NFT.

getMemberships(uint256).notice: Returns all community addresses the user is a member of.

getReputationScore(uint256).notice: Returns the on-chain reputation score (0–10000 basis points).

getTokenId(address).notice: Returns the token ID for a given wallet address. Returns 0 if not registered.

isMember(uint256,address).notice: Returns true if the token is currently a member of the given community.

isVerified(uint256).notice: Returns true if the token holds a valid KYC hash.

mint(address,string).notice: Mint a soulbound NFT to a new user. Called by PlatformFactory on registration.

registerBountyContract(address).notice: Register a bounty contract for privileged reputation callbacks.

registerCommunity(address).notice: Register a community registry for privileged membership callbacks.

registerProjectContract(address).notice: Register a project contract for privileged reputation callbacks.

removeCommunityMembership(uint256,addres.notice: Remove community membership from a user's NFT.

setKYCHash(uint256,bytes32).notice: Set ZK-KYC hash. Called by the platform KYC oracle after off-chain verification.

updateReputation(uint256,(bool,bool,bool.notice: Update reputation counters. Called by project/bounty contracts after events.
